title: FDA Approves Merck's IDVYNSO for HIV
headline: FDA approves Merck's once-daily two-drug oral combination IDVYNSO (doravirine/islatravir) for HIV-1 infection in adults, with islatravir being a first-in-class NRTTI mechanism.
key_facts: 100 mg doravirine + 0.25 mg islatravir; FDA approved April 21, 2026; first-in-class nucleoside reverse transcriptase translocation inhibitor (NRTTI)

title: Merck & Google Strike $1B AI Deal
headline: Merck and Google announce a $1 billion enterprise AI partnership to accelerate drug discovery and enterprise operations.
key_facts: $1 billion deal value; enterprise AI partnership for drug discovery and operations

title: AbbVie Invests $1.4B in NC Manufacturing
headline: AbbVie announces $1.4 billion investment to establish new pharmaceutical manufacturing facility in North Carolina.
key_facts: $1.4 billion investment; North Carolina production facility; announced April 22, 2026

title: Amneal Acquires Kashiv for $1.1B
headline: Amneal Pharmaceuticals acquires biosimilars specialist Kashiv BioSciences for $1.1 billion.

title: Revolution Medicines Pancreatic Cancer Data
headline: Revolution Medicines' daraxonrasib demonstrates significant overall survival benefit in Phase 3 metastatic pancreatic cancer trial, with blockbuster sales potential.
key_facts: Phase 3 positive results in metastatic pancreatic cancer; AACR 2026 presentation; $2 billion capital raise completed

title: Roche Fenebrutinib MS Data & Liver Safety
headline: Roche's fenebrutinib, an oral BTK inhibitor for multiple sclerosis, shows relapse delay in Phase 3 but raises liver toxicity concerns; regulatory filing planned.
key_facts: Phase 3 data released April 21; first oral BTK inhibitor with Phase 3 MS efficacy; liver toxicity signal identified

title: Sanofi Sarclisa Subcutaneous FDA Delay
headline: FDA delays decision on Sanofi's subcutaneous formulation of Sarclisa (isatuximab).
key_facts: FDA decision delayed; subcutaneous formulation; regulatory update April 22, 2026

title: BridgeBio Oncology Spinoff CEO Change
headline: BridgeBio's oncology spinoff replaces CEO as it accelerates KRAS-targeted drug development programs.
key_facts: CEO change announced April 22, 2026; KRAS-focused oncology programs

title: Rigel Loses Eli Lilly RIPK Alliance
headline: Rigel Pharmaceuticals loses its Eli Lilly partnership as Lilly exits RIPK kinase program, part of broader industry retreat from RIPK targets.
key_facts: Alliance termination; RIPK program exit; announced April 22, 2026

title: Nektar $325M Offering; Alopecia Data
headline: Nektar Therapeutics prices $325 million public offering as alopecia drug demonstrates deepening response in extension study.
key_facts: $325 million offering; extension study shows deepening treatment response; shares rallied substantially over prior year

title: Tortugas Neuroscience Launches with $106M
headline: Tortugas Neuroscience launches with $106 million Series A funding and a portfolio of brain drugs licensed from Hansoh Pharma and Eisai, led by former Sage Therapeutics executives.
key_facts: $106 million Series A funding; brain drug portfolio; founded by Jeff Jonas and Al Robichaud (ex-Sage)

title: BioAge NLRP3 Inhibitor 'Best-in-Class' Data
headline: BioAge reports early data suggesting best-in-class potential for its NLRP3 inflammasome-targeting drug, rebounding from prior obesity program setback.
key_facts: NLRP3 inflammasome inhibitor; early-stage data; positioned as best-in-class

title: Purdue Pharma $225M Forfeiture Directive
headline: U.S. judge expected to direct Purdue Pharma to forfeit $225 million to the Justice Department, clearing the way for a massive opioid settlement.
key_facts: $225 million forfeiture; opioid settlement; judicial ruling expected April 21-22, 2026

title: BMS Mezigdomide Phase 3 SUCCESSOR-2 Data
headline: Bristol-Myers Squibb's mezigdomide shows positive Phase 3 results in SUCCESSOR-2 trial for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma.
key_facts: Phase 3 SUCCESSOR-2 trial positive; relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma indication; AACR 2026 presentation
